title: Quality System Audit Event
description: Immutable audit event record for every scoring decision, data refresh, status change, dispute, and methodology update in the quality scoring system.

event_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this audit event (UUID v4).

event_type.description: The classification of the event. Determines the expected shape of the payload object.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date-time (UTC) at which the event occurred. Set by the system at event creation; never client-supplied.

actor.description: Who triggered the event. Use the literal string 'system' for automated pipeline actions; use the authenticated user ID (e.g., 'user:jsmith') for manual actions.

npi.description: 10-digit National Provider Identifier this event pertains to. Null for system-wide events (e.g., methodology_changed, data_refresh_* events that are not NPI-scoped).

payload.description: Event-type-specific data. The expected keys vary by event_type. See audit_trail_schema.md for per-type payload definitions and examples.

payload.provider_claim: Malpractice case listed was dismissed and should not count.
